name: wristband_daemon
description: First-party FERAL HUP v1.1 daemon for a Bluetooth-LE health wristband. Reads heart rate (GATT 0x2A37) and SpO2 (GATT 0x2A5E) and streams them as device_event(event_type=heart_rate|spo2). Supports a haptic buzz actuator via hup_action_request. If the wristband exposes a GATT audio stream, relays Opus frames as HUP v1.1 audio_frame events.
